message:
test: add 19 property tests for restart_scheduler serde + scoring invariants

Covers serde roundtrips (RestartMode, Config, ActivityProfile, ScoredWindow,
ScheduledRestart, SchedulingDecision, Telemetry, Scheduler) and scoring
invariants (bounded outputs, monotonicity, non-negative scores, sorted
evaluation windows, manual/advisory mode never triggers).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
